name: Papaya-Seed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sugar, mustard, vinegar, MSG (if using), and salt in a blender.
2. Blend the ingredients until smooth.
3. Gradually add oil and minced onion to the blender while continuing to blend.
4. Once thoroughly blended, stir in the papaya seeds.
5. The dressing will make approximately 3 cups.
